title: [PATCH]: Fix the BYOP to localstorage in the sirius app
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Siriusly persistent keys
gist.blurb: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app now remembers your Bring-Your-Own-Pollen key between visits. No more typing it in every time you want to ride.
gist.summary: Updated the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app to persist Bring-Your-Own-Pollen (BYOP) keys in local storage.
gist.impact: Users of the Sirius app will no longer need to re-enter their BYOP key on every visit, as it now safely lives in their browser's local storage.
gist.visual_concept: Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app storing BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) keys locally. Visual symbols: an elevator, a key, a storage box. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. Scene: Polly and the robot in a cozy retro elevator, putting a glowing key into a safe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot inside a retro elevator with glowing buttons. The robot is carefully placing a glowing golden key into a small wooden storage box. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
